test_cases.brand_brief: We are launching a sustainable skincare brand called Verdant targeting eco-conscious women aged 25-40. The brand should feel premium but warm and grounded in nature. The color palette must be WCAG AA accessible. No neon colors.

agent1.rationale: The brand focus on sustainability, natural skincare, and warm grounded aesthetic aligns with the Organic archetype.
constraints: Color palette must be WCAG AA accessible
Must feel warm and grounded in nature
Tone must be approachable for eco-conscious women aged 25-40
Must avoid harsh or synthetic visual elements
Must incorporate natural or organic design elements
Must respect industry conventions of the sustainable skincare industry

test_cases.brand_brief: We are building a fintech startup called Vault targeting young professionals aged 22-35. The brand should feel cutting-edge, trustworthy, and minimal. No traditional bank vibes. Must be WCAG accessible. No warm or earthy tones.

agent1.rationale: The brand emphasis on cutting-edge modern minimal aesthetic combined with fintech focus aligns with the Tech archetype.
constraints: Must have a sleek modern look
Must be suitable for young professionals aged 22-35
